description: Global styles, colors, typography, flexbox utilities, responsive mixins
requirements: Typography: Sans-serif (Arial/Helvetica), header 20-24px bold, body 14px, small 12px
Layouts: app-container (flex column, full viewport), app-header (fixed 60px), app-body (flex row), left-sidebar (fixed width ~180px), main-content (flex-grow), right-panel (fixed width ~200px)
Utilities: spacing/padding classes, flexbox helpers, responsive breakpoints
notes: MainLayout.razor.css: Root layout with flexbox (3-column: sidebar | content | right-panel). Header fixed 60px, sidebar fixed 180px, right-panel fixed 200px, main-content grows. All colors from handoff colorScheme.

global.css: CSS variables for all colors, global typography (Arial sans-serif, h1 24px bold, body 14px, small 12px), flexbox utilities (flex, flex-col, flex-between, gap-*), spacing classes (p-*, px-*, py-*, m-*), text/bg/border utilities. Responsive breakpoints as comments only (will be implemented in Quartet 8).
No media queries implemented yet — desktop layout only. Breakpoints documented in comments for Tablet (768-1199px) and Mobile (<768px).
Uses CSS custom properties (--color-*) for colors, enabling easy theme changes. Scrollbar styling included for better UX.
